title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 660.200 - Rules, procedure
text:
660.200.  Rules, procedure. — No rule or portion of a rule promulgated under the authority of sections 660.150 to 660.200 shall become effective unless it has been promulgated pursuant to the provisions of section 536.024.
(L. 1979 H.B. 545, et al. § 19, A.L. 1981 S.B. 200, A.L. 1995 S.B. 3)
